message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in allocator_analysis.zig and async_state_machine.zig

Add comprehensive handlers for for_stmt.orelse_body, while_stmt.orelse_body,
try_stmt (else_body, finalbody), with_stmt, and match_stmt to:

allocator_analysis.zig:
- collectNestedClasses

async_state_machine.zig:
- findAwaitPointsInNode
- findVarsInNode
